Have a question about how I can help? Or anything at all? Get in touch today and I will reply as soon as I can!
I just need your name and email, and you'll be on the list!

Serving the entire Northeast Kingdom

Discover Northern Vermont Real Estate at your Pace! Whether you want to move fast, or you prefer to take your time in your search for a dream property, we can help with all your Real Estate needs at your Pace

Start your search here!
Northern Vermont Real Estate

Get In Touch Today!



Hi! I'm Danica Rolfe, broker/owner at Pace Real Estate. Whether you are buying or selling a home, land or commercial property in Vermont's Northeast Kingdom, I can help. Just send me a quick note and I will get back to you right away so we can start the process!

I'm ready to Buy!
I'm ready to sell!
Tell me a little about yourself and what you are looking for in a house, and I will get get back to you soon!
Tell me a little about yourself and your house and I will get get back to you soon!
